creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Benjamin Kaduk from comment #1)
Thank-you for your informative answer as pointer and the additional (RFC) information assisted with the upstream issue:

https://github.com/heimdal/heimdal/issues/815

It would seem appropriate to close this as "Works as intended", as the doc for my FreeBSD 12.2S, heimdal base 1.5.2 is properly documented wrt HMAC-SHA2, while the documentation (manpage) for my port heimdal-7.7 contains an incomplete statement for the enc types. ;)
